Commander Roles.name: king
Commander Roles.power: You start with 50 life and have a hidden helper the Knight

Commander Roles.name: knight
Commander Roles.power: You are in hidden service to your king prevent his death and if he dies avenge him
Commander Roles.Wincon: No opponents remaining or avenge the kings death

Commander Roles.name: sellsword
Commander Roles.power: At the beginning of the game, start an auction where players bid life for your services, if your employer leaves the game you lose

Commander Roles.name: hunter
Commander Roles.power: At the beginning of the game choose a role in play(don't show other players), this role is your target

Commander Roles.name: bodyguard
Commander Roles.power: At the beginning of the game, start an auction where players bid life for your services, if your employer leaves the game you lose, you CANNOT attack, You have the ability to tap your creatures to intercept creatures attacking your employer as well as being able to put a total of 10 of your life infront of your employer to reduce damage

Commander Roles.name: necromancer
Commander Roles.power: One time per game when a player dies and no wincon is fulfilled you may reveal your role and replace their role with the Skelsword, the Skelsword retains 6 permenants and gains 30 life

Commander Roles.name: twin
Commander Roles.power: Use the power of friendship to defeat your foes

Commander Roles.name: seer
Commander Roles.power: When you kill a player that has a hidden role reveal your role and guess the opponents role

Commander Roles.name: glasscannon
Commander Roles.power: You start the game with 30 life, damage you deal is doubled

Commander Roles.name: warlord
Commander Roles.Wincon: Deal 30 commander damage total to players

Commander Roles.name: maskedman
Commander Roles.power: At the beginning of the game reveal Maskedman and choose a role from the list that is not in the game. If the role is normally a revealed role play with it revealed

Commander Roles.name: chaos
Commander Roles.power: When you die reveal Chaos and roll 6d6 you gain the result in life and keep 8 permenants

Commander Roles.name: doppleganger
Commander Roles.power: When you kill someone swap roles with the person you killed and heal life equal to half the health your victim had at the start of the turn
Commander Roles.Wincon: Swap roles with someone and achieve their wincon
